founder.name: Julia Philip
founder.caption: Founder & Visionary
founder.intro:
Founded by Julia Philip, a young student whose passion for helping others inspired her to create a space where youth could be heard, Star to Write reflects both her vision and values.

Through the organization, she has found comfort and friendship in her team, while leading with dedication and a commitment to amplifying diverse voices.

members.name: Ace
members.description: Ace Eryx is a non-binary Polish writer who has worked at magazines such as The Odyssey Youth, The Third Eye Literary, and The Eyre Magazine. One day they hope to pursue law, though until then they will be observing nature and the changing of the seasons.

members.name: Lynn
members.description: Hallo!! Call me Lynn! I’m a current senior in high school and I draw and sing during my freetime! I’m VERY normal about Japanese music projects.. (totally…) as I love yapping about those for hours.

members.name: Eli
members.description: Hello, I’m head of journalism and a content creator. I have 16 years on this earth and I love my friends and exploring new things.

members.name: Ayesha
members.description: Obsessed with a singer, Benson Boone, Ayesha Toor is the manager of operations for Startowrite. She makes sure everyone is on track and that YOUR writing is shared with the world.​

members.name: Mads Kaisner
members.description: Hi! I’m Mads, Manager and Marketing Head in Star to Write! I’m so happy your reading this! Submit and publish to Star to Write today!
